emails.subject: URGENT: Chargeback Notice - Johnson Deal
emails.body_text:
CHARGEBACK NOTICE

Chargeback ID: CB-2026-0089
Dealer: Sunshine & Set Automotive
Deal Reference: SL-2026-0412
Customer: Michael Johnson

Product: Vehicle Service Contract
Chargeback Amount: $2,800.00
Effective Date: April 14, 2026

Reason: Customer requested cancellation outside the 60-day free-look period. The chargeback amount reflects the prorated refund calculation plus administrative processing fees per your dealer agreement.

This chargeback exceeds $2,500 and requires immediate escalation per your dealer agreement. Please process within 24 hours.

SafeGuard Warranty — Dealer Chargeback Services

emails.subject: Funding Status Update - SL-2026-0412
emails.body_text:
Funding Status Update — Deal SL-2026-0412

Contract Amount: $30,500.00
Submission Date: April 8, 2026
Status: PENDING — Missing Stipulations

Required Items:
1. Power of Attorney (original, notarized)
2. Payoff Letter from previous lienholder (must show account number and good-through date)

Please provide outstanding documentation by end of business today, April 14, 2026. Contracts exceeding $25,000 are subject to accelerated review timelines per our dealer agreement.

Wells Fargo Dealer Services — Funding Department

emails.subject: RE: Daily Cash Deposit - April 14
emails.body_text:
I'll be out at lunch from 12-1:30pm. If you find the source of the $180 discrepancy on the Johnson deal, leave the details on my desk. Do NOT close the daily cash report until we resolve this.

Renee

emails.subject: Month-End Close Calendar - April 2026
emails.body_text:
Team,

April 2026 Close Calendar:

BD 1 (April 12): Final day for deal posting
BD 2 (April 13): AP check run, vendor 1099 review
BD 3 (April 14): Bank reconciliation, floorplan reconciliation, contracts in transit review
BD 4 (April 15): Commission sheets due, preliminary P&L
BD 5 (April 16): Final adjustments, close binder due

Please note the adjusted close calendar below. Reminder: all month-end deliverables must be submitted by their assigned deadlines. Reach out if you have questions about any of your assigned items.

Elena Brooks
Controller
